risk.desc: Potential structural issues under static display loads
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to ensure structural integrity

risk.desc: Assembly repeatability may be compromised by human error
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and training for operators

risk.desc: Incorrect mating of connectors may lead to misalignment
risk.mit: Implement keying and labeling on connectors to prevent mis-mating

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief for cables may cause damage
risk.mit: Add strain relief geometry to all cable exits and ensure proper routing

risk.desc: Potential for overclaiming the educational mockup as functional
risk.mit: Clearly label and document the display-only nature of the subsystem

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or datum features to ensure precise assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of damage during handling due to lack of protective features.
risk.mit: Add protective features such as corner guards and reinforced edges.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with detailed steps and tools required.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to lack of keying or labeling on connectors.
risk.mit: Ensure connectors have clear keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient reinforcement in critical areas.
risk.mit: Add structural reinforcement in areas subject to high loads.

generated_parts.label: Integration Inspection Ring
generated_parts.spec: Integration_inspection ring with assembly_datum pads, inspection_window, checklist_callout, connection type labels, load-path closure marks

verify.value: All required fields and features are present.
verify.rule: All specified fields and features must be included in the blueprint.

verify.value: Mass estimate is within expected range.
verify.rule: Mass estimate must be a numeric value and within the expected range for the subsystem.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are referenced in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must appear as a part_tree child and be referenced in geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal and detailed.
verify.rule: Each interface must specify connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence is present.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions are set for downstream analysis.
verify.rule: Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential access blockage during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure clear access paths in the assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Weak interface at snap-fit connection.
risk.mit: Consider alternative connection types for higher load applications.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between adjacent interfaces.
risk.mit: Review and adjust fit_class and stack_up_mm values.

risk.desc: Process limitations with LPBF for complex geometries.
risk.mit: Evaluate alternative manufacturing processes for complex features.

risk.desc: Overclaiming of mockup structure as flight-ready.
risk.mit: Clarify that this is a display mockup and not a flight-ready component.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Assembly order evidence, inspection windows, checklist hooks, connection types and load-path closure

physics_paths.path: inspection_window -> assembly_datum -> checklist_callout
assembly_datum -> turbopump_assembly_dummy -> harness_path
inspection_label -> connection_type_labels -> load_path_closure_marks
